clarity.notes: Index hub now frames product journey in 4 stages instead of flat file list; primary CTA starts auth flow.

hierarchy.notes: Hero → aesthetic bar → journey stages → resource map. Featured cards highlight Start/Core/SOS.

typography.notes: Plus Jakarta; display clamp; mono for meta tokens; ALL CAPS tracking floor enforced (0.06em).

motion.notes: Card hover lift only on hub; screen-level motion remains in loading/SOS. Optional next: micro entrance.

brand.notes: Tokens + logo preserved; gold/blue badges sparingly; no indigo/purple-gradient slop.
